2606.13119.title: MP3: Multi-Period Pattern Pre-training for Spatio-Temporal Forecasting
2606.13119.paper_summary: Spatio-Temporal forecasting is crucial in diverse fields, such as transportation, climate, and energy. Urban spatio-temporal data exhibits temporal mirage: similar short-window inputs have divergent future trends, and vice versa. Existing spatio-temporal graph neural networks (STGNNs) cannot effectively identify such mirages. We argue that the core reason lies in the short-window inputs that have incomplete period observation, heterogeneous global spatial correlation, and cross-period superposition causality. To bridge this gap, we develop a novel Multi- Period Pattern Pre-training (MP3), a plug-and-play pre-training plugin for distinguishing temporal mirages. MP3 presents two core innovations: (1) The multi-period pattern learning is designed to learn multi-period patterns from long time series. Specifically, multi-period temporal modeling leverages edge convolution to identify different multi-period patterns. Multi-period spatial modeling uses a bottleneck project and a global memory bank to capture heterogeneous global spatial relations efficiently. Cross-period pattern interaction employs a causality-enhanced Transformer to capture dependencies across different period patterns. (2) This plugin can seamlessly integrate into existing STGNN backbones to strengthen their forecasting performance. The experiment on five STGNN baselines across five real-world datasets (including a large-scale dataset CA) verify the effectiveness, superior scalability and strong adaptability of MP3, which brings consistent and robust performance improvements across all evaluated baselines. On average, MP3 reduces the MAE 4.7% and the RMSE 5.0%. The code can be available at https://github.com/YAN-outlook/MP3.
2606.13119.paper_summary_zh: 時空預測在交通、氣候和能源等多個領域中至關重要。城市時空數據顯示出時間幻影：相似的短窗口輸入卻有著不同的未來趨勢，反之亦然。現有的時空圖神經網絡（STGNN）無法有效識別這種幻影。我們認為，核心原因在於短窗口輸入存在不完整的周期觀察、異質的全球空間相關性以及跨周期的疊加因果關係。為了彌補這一差距，我們開發了一種新穎的多周期模式預訓練（MP3），這是一個即插即用的預訓練插件，用於區分時間幻影。MP3提出了兩個核心創新：（1）多周期模式學習旨在從長時間序列中學習多周期模式。具體而言，多周期時間建模利用邊緣卷積來識別不同的多周期模式。多周期空間建模使用瓶頸項目和全球記憶庫來有效捕捉異質的全球空間關係。跨周期模式互動採用增強因果關係的Transformer來捕捉不同周期模式之間的依賴關係。（2）該插件可以無縫集成到現有的STGNN骨幹中，以加強其預測性能。在五個真實世界數據集（包括一個大型數據集CA）上的五個STGNN基準實驗驗證了MP3的有效性、優越的可擴展性和強大的適應性，該插件在所有評估的基準中帶來了一致且穩健的性能提升。平均而言，MP3將MAE降低了4.7%，RMSE降低了5.0%。代碼可在 https://github.com/YAN-outlook/MP3 獲得。
2606.13119.author: Lilan Peng et.al.
2606.13119.authors: Lilan Peng, Yandi Liu, Qingren Yao, Chongshou Li, Tianrui Li
